title: Process-first target contract for Decision Record, Evidence Vault and Audit Semantics

definition_of_done: Acceptance criteria cover positive and negative paths.
UI, service and test boundaries are named.

user_added_acceptance_rule.rule: Every process step and its inputs/outputs need a UI pendant; if screens are missing, introduce them.
user_added_acceptance_rule.contract_enforcement: decisionRecordEvidenceAuditRouteOwnership.stepPendants requires inputUi, gateOrDecisionUi, outputUi and blockerOrFailureUi for every declared route pendant.
user_added_acceptance_rule.screen_gap_resolution: S051 is contract-owned as audit_history for BP-082/BP-083 even though the current renderer is shared with communication/export ops; implementation must make that ownership visible/tested or move the renderer.

payload_visibility.client_safe: decision id, title, client-safe summary, released state, released_at and next allowed client action only
payload_visibility.internal_review: options, linked evidence summary, rationale summary, audit reference, review history and status transition reason
payload_visibility.internal_only: AI draft, internal rationale, advisor notes, compliance notes, raw evidence, audit metadata and command/debug payloads

proof_boundaries: decision success shows scoped persisted result only
evidence detail is provenance review only
audit history is read-only and cannot replace persisted audit proof

must_not_mark_domain_i_implemented_until: UI attributes/tests prove all route ownership and step-pendant mapping.
Negative tests cover role/scope, no-overclaim, audit-display-not-persistence and evidence-link-not-sufficiency.
Backend lifecycle/audit fail-closed proof exists for missing DOMAIN-I step-level and audit-failure gaps.
Matrix is updated only after service/UI/test proof.
